title: Hydrostats
description: The final project for UC San Diego's DSC 106 course working with a team of 4. We created a visualization of water lost while exercising to give a way to understanding how much one should be drinking to replenish their water loss.

title: Hydrophobic
description: My friends and I worked on a game for GMTK Game Jam, we unfortunately couldn't complete it, however we are still proud of what we did accomplish within 48 hours. I hope that one day we can put up a little play ground for people to at least we what we were cooking!

title: D&D Roll Distributions
description: Created some simple python code to create dnd roll distributions with the plotly graph library. A mini fun project because DND and stats are fun!

title: Pantry Pal
description: Developed an app using ChatGPT, Whisper, and DALL-E APIs, creating recipes from voice input into the app and storing account data via a MongoDB database. Course Project for CSE 110: Software Engineering at UC San Diego.

title: Boston Bike Vis
description: Creates a visualization of when bike riders arrive and leave certain locations across the boston metropolitan area! Apart of the course DSC 106 at UC San Diego.

title: Choice Forest
description: For my final project in my Creative Writing class in my senior year of high school. I created a choose your own adventure story and used my new knowledge of Java to write an in compiler way of making each choice. I had only knew programming from my APCS class and I wanted to try to make something cool with that knowledge.

title: Meal Generator
description: A python script that Generates a week of meals based on a JSON files with recipes, and then creates a grocery list based on those meals for that week!
